privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real dive data from the official Subsurface dataset (SampleDivesV2.ssrf), containing actual dive computer logs. The target output path is /home/ga/Documents/dive3_profile.csv, and the exported data must strictly be the profile waypoints scoped only to Dive 3.
